channel.title: BUbreakingSectionTwo
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from BUbreakingSectionTwo, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: The Trumpiest Trump We’ve Ever Beheld
item.description: The president is becoming the very thing that destroyed the Democrats: a reality-denying machine.

item.title: Trump didn’t mention the $38.8 trillion national debt once in his State of the Union, but 90% of voters are worried
item.description: "Kitchen table cost-of-living issues" are top of mind right now, the Peterson Foundation says, and voters connect them to the spiralling national debt...

item.title: Nvidia’s record quarter and what it signals for CFOs: ‘Compute equals revenue’
item.description: As hyperscalers pour billions into AI, Nvidia’s results offer a new benchmark for capital spending on compute.

item.title: Exclusive: Crypto trading platform raises $30 million from CMT Digital and Kraken
item.description: The fundraise for STS Digital, whose product is aimed at institutions, also included Arrington Capital and an investment arm of Fidelity.

item.title: Russia Launches Big Strikes Before U.S.-Ukraine Talks in Geneva
item.description: Moscow unleashed an extensive drone and missile attack just hours before American officials were set to meet with Kyiv’s chief negotiator.

item.title: Child Care Giant Let Some Staff Work Without Full Vetting, Records Show
item.description: Inspectors found several instances in which staff members at Bright Horizons were working in classrooms even though they had not completed all of the ...

item.title: World Economic Forum Chief Resigns Over Epstein Ties
item.description: Borge Brende, a former foreign minister of Norway, had maintained contact with the convicted sex offender.

item.title: ‘I sell millions of Halloween costumes to Americans. Mr. President—here’s my takeaway from the wild tariffs ride’
item.description: Why President Trump's tariffs may not be the boon to reshoring he imagines.

item.title: What We Know About the Gun Battle Off the Coast of Cuba
item.description: Four armed Cubans aboard a Florida-based speedboat died in a gunfight with Cuban border troops on Wednesday, officials said.

item.title: Senator opens inquiry into Binance over allegations it fired investigators who flagged that more than $1 billion flowed to Iranian entities
item.description: The probe comes after a Fortune investigation raised questions about the crypto firm’s compliance program.

item.title: A Last Chance Before War
item.description: The U.S. and Iran both say they want to avoid a conflict. Time is running out to avoid one.

item.title: What We Know About the Gun Battle Off the Coast of Cuba
item.description: Four armed Cubans aboard a Florida-based speedboat died in a gunfight with Cuban border troops on Wednesday, officials said.

item.title: Russia Launches Big Strikes Before U.S.-Ukraine Talks in Geneva
item.description: Moscow unleashed an extensive drone and missile attack just hours before American officials were set to meet with Kyiv’s chief negotiator.

item.title: Marco Rubio Says U.S. Is Probing Deadly Cuban Shooting
item.description: Cuban officials said border troops engaged in gunfire with a Florida-based speedboat on Wednesday, leaving four dead on the boat and six wounded. Secr...

item.title: A Deal or War? Crucial Talks Begin Between U.S. and Iran.
item.description: President Trump has kept up a steady drumbeat of threats and built up U.S. troops in the region. Iran’s task is to give him a win but also preserve so...
